subcodes.title: Words to a Unitarian woman, spoken on 1912-03-26
subcodes.first_line: The most important of all intentions is to spread the love of God.... Glad tidings, glad tidings, the Sun of love has dawned
subcodes.first_line_orig: مژده مژده که علم ملکوت بلند شد مژده مژده بهار الهی ظاهر گردید مژده مژده ابر رحمت ببارید
subcodes.subjects: @man's distinction from the animal, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
